summary: Tested 4 new features for Graupner Suite: 1) E-Mail-Vorlagen for Einsatzplanung, 2) .ics calendar file download, 3) Customer Portal Einsatz/Termin data, 4) IMAP email reception. All 16 backend tests pass. Frontend UI verified for all features.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/auth/login - returns token
Backend: GET /api/einsatz-config - returns config with termin_vorlagen field
Backend: PUT /api/einsatz-config - can save termin_vorlagen
Backend: GET /api/einsaetze - lists einsätze
Backend: GET /api/einsaetze/{id}/ics - returns .ics calendar file with correct format
Backend: POST /api/einsaetze/{id}/email - endpoint exists and validates input
Backend: POST /api/imap/test - endpoint exists and validates IMAP credentials
Backend: POST /api/imap/test - returns 400 for missing fields
Backend: POST /api/imap/fetch - endpoint exists
Backend: GET /api/anfragen - returns anfragen with reparaturgruppe field
Backend: PUT /api/anfragen/{id} - can update reparaturgruppe
Backend: POST /api/portal/verify/{token} - returns einsatz_data with termin info
Backend: GET /api/settings - returns IMAP fields
Backend: PUT /api/settings - can save IMAP configuration
Frontend: Einsatzplanung page loads with 6 Einsatz cards
Frontend: Expanded Einsatz card shows 'Termin-E-Mail senden' button
Frontend: Email dialog opens with template selection, recipient, subject, message fields
Frontend: Email dialog shows 'Vorlage wählen' dropdown with templates
Frontend: Config dialog has 'E-Mail-Vorlagen' tab
Frontend: E-Mail-Vorlagen tab shows placeholders and existing templates
Frontend: Settings → Einsatzplanung tab shows all 4 config sections
Frontend: Settings → E-Mail tab shows IMAP E-Mail-Empfang section
Frontend: IMAP settings has server/port/user/password/folder fields
Frontend: Anfragen page shows Reparaturgruppe badges
Frontend: Anfragen expanded card shows Reparaturgruppe detail section
Frontend: Anfragen edit modal shows Reparaturgruppe field with options
seed_data_creation: Used existing test data - 6 Einsätze with 'Testkunde', 7 Anfragen with various Reparaturgruppen
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 new features fully implemented and tested: 1) E-Mail-Vorlagen in Einsatzplanung config dialog with placeholders {kunde_name}, {termin_datum}, {termin_zeit}, {reparaturgruppe}, {monteur}, {beschreibung}, {firma_name}. 2) .ics calendar download via GET /api/einsaetze/{id}/ics returns valid ICS format. 3) Customer Portal verify endpoint returns einsatz_data with termin info. 4) IMAP settings in Settings → E-Mail tab with test/fetch endpoints. Anfragen now have reparaturgruppe field visible in list, detail view, and edit modal. Note: IMAP test/fetch will fail without real IMAP server - endpoints return proper error messages.
